sqrt_144.question: What is the square root of 144?

sqrt_100.question: What is the square root of 100?

geo.question: What is the capital of France?

interpretation_detail: V vectors transfer when donor and target share geometric structure in representation space. World-knowledge tokens occupy rich high-dimensional semantic space; numerical tokens use compact structured representations (likely Fourier-basis per Nanda et al.). The boundary is representational geometry, not content type or processing mode. Predicts: numerical representations fail regardless of retrieval vs computation; semantic/entity representations succeed regardless of domain.
